redir request urls.name: redir request urls
redir request urls.description: replace boomlings.com/database with the our server url in all requests

leave labels alone you dumb bitch.name: don't break labels you genius
leave labels alone you dumb bitch.description: she will see and stop breaking the labels. what is she even trying to say?

wildcards-section.name: Wild cards
wildcards-section.description: With each wildcard, you can disable randomization for a specific vehicle type

Extras-section.name: Extras
Extras-section.description: A few extra options to make the experience even more enjoyable :D

easyMode.name: Easy Mode
easyMode.description: This option gives the chance to 50% to stay all portals in the original portal

freeMode.name: Free Fly Mode
freeMode.description: This option gives the option to make the camera free in the game

enable-in-editor.name: Enable random textures in editor
enable-in-editor.description: This option enable the texture randomization in the editor

disableBlending.name: Disable Portal Bleding
disableBlending.description: This removes the blending for the portal particules
